title: She Loves and Lies
writer: Wilkie Collins, Grant Cooper, Chester Withey
actors: Norma Talmadge, Conway Tearle, Octavia Broske
plot: When Marie Callender is left a fortune by a wealthy old admirer on the condition that she marry the man she loves, Marie targets Ernest Lismore but is too shy to ask him to marry her. Instead, Marie disguises herself as an elderly...
